mano_cua.result_summary: 200%缩放时PDF右侧内容被截断（右列文本到x=760，白色空白到x=1280），但mano-cua未能明确验证水平滚动条是否出现。playground过于简单无缩放控件，仅通过浏览器缩放测试，62步超时未得出明确结论
mano_cua.last_reasoning: At 200% zoom, PDF content appears cut off on the right side with ~520px white space. The right column text ends around x=760 while viewport extends to x=1280.
